creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
I think you must have made a mistake while checking the plist. (Maybe the patch didn't apply to pkg-plist for some reason?)

Random example: libs/bower_components/jScrollPane/GPL-LICENSE.txt isn't part of https://builds.piwik.org/piwik-2.16.2.tar.gz and my patch removes it from the pkg-plist.
